---
title: "01_load_clean_data"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(here)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
library(scales)
library(purrr)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# Helper functions
#--------------------------------------------------

fix_missing <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      across(
        where(is.character),
        ~ .x %>%
          na_if("'--") %>%
          na_if("--") %>%
          na_if("")
      )
    )
}

first_non_missing <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x) & x != ""]
  if (length(x) == 0) NA else x[1]
}
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load raw data
#--------------------------------------------------

sample_sheet_raw <- read_tsv(
  here("data", "raw", "gdc_sample_sheet.2026-04-07.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

clinical_raw <- read_tsv(
  here("data", "raw", "clinical.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

followup_raw <- read_tsv(
  here("data", "raw", "follow_up.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

pathology_raw <- read_tsv(
  here("data", "raw", "pathology_detail.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

exposure_raw <- read_tsv(
  here("data", "raw", "exposure.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

family_raw <- read_tsv(
  here("data", "raw", "family_history.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

expr_raw <- read_csv(
  here("data", "raw", "gene_count_matrix_1pass_TCGA.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 2. Cleaning + Fix missing values
#--------------------------------------------------

sample_sheet <- sample_sheet_raw %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  fix_missing()

clinical <- clinical_raw %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  fix_missing()

followup <- followup_raw %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  fix_missing()

pathology <- pathology_raw %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  fix_missing()

exposure <- exposure_raw %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  fix_missing()

family <- family_raw %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  fix_missing()

expr <- expr_raw %>% 
  fix_missing()
```

```{r}
glimpse(clinical)
summary(clinical$demographic_age_at_index)
table(clinical$demographic_vital_status, useNA = "ifany")
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 3. Sample manifest
#--------------------------------------------------

sample_manifest <- sample_sheet %>%
  transmute(
    file_id,
    file_name,
    data_category,
    data_type,
    project_id,
    case_submitter_id = case_id,
    sample_submitter_id = sample_id,
    tissue_type,
    tumor_descriptor,
    specimen_type,
    preservation_method
  ) %>%
  distinct()
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 4. Building a master file for clinical data
#--------------------------------------------------

# Pathology, exposure and family history files were inspected initially, but not retained in the modelling table.

clinical_core <- clinical %>%
  transmute(
    case_submitter_id = cases_submitter_id,
    case_uuid = cases_case_id,
    project_id = project_project_id,
    age_at_index = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(demographic_age_at_index)),
    gender = demographic_gender,
    race = demographic_race,
    ethnicity = demographic_ethnicity,
    days_to_death = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(demographic_days_to_death))) %>%
  group_by(case_submitter_id) %>%
  summarise(
    case_uuid = first_non_missing(case_uuid),
    project_id = first_non_missing(project_id),
    age_at_index = first_non_missing(age_at_index),
    gender = first_non_missing(gender),
    race = first_non_missing(race),
    ethnicity = first_non_missing(ethnicity),
    days_to_death = if (all(is.na(days_to_death))) NA_real_ else max(days_to_death, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")

followup_core <- followup %>%
  transmute(
    case_submitter_id = cases_submitter_id,
    days_to_follow_up = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(follow_ups_days_to_follow_up))) %>%
  group_by(case_submitter_id) %>%
  summarise(days_to_follow_up = if (all(is.na(days_to_follow_up))) NA_real_ 
            else max(days_to_follow_up, na.rm = TRUE),.groups = "drop")

clinical_master <- clinical_core %>%
  left_join(followup_core, by = "case_submitter_id") %>%
  select(
    case_submitter_id,
    case_uuid,
    project_id,
    age_at_index,
    gender,
    race,
    ethnicity,
    days_to_death,
    days_to_follow_up)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# Clinical checks
#--------------------------------------------------

clinical_missing_summary <- clinical_master %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ mean(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "missing_prop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(missing_prop))

clinical_missing_summary
```

```{r}
clinical_master %>%
  count(case_submitter_id) %>%
  filter(n > 1)
```

```{r}
clinical_missing_summary %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(variable, missing_prop), y = missing_prop)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent) +
  labs(
    title = "Missingness in compact clinical table",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Proportion missing"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 6. Expression matrix + Cleaning
#--------------------------------------------------

# Expression values are retained as counts at this stage.
# Normalisation or transformation will be handled during feature engineering.

expr_clean <- expr %>%
  rename(gene_id = 1) %>%
  mutate(gene_id = str_remove(gene_id, "\\..*$")) %>%
  mutate(across(-gene_id, as.numeric)) %>%
  group_by(gene_id) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE)), .groups = "drop")

sum(duplicated(expr_clean$gene_id))
dim(expr_clean)

expr_t <- expr_clean %>%
  column_to_rownames("gene_id") %>%
  t() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("sample_submitter_id") %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  mutate(
    case_submitter_id = str_sub(sample_submitter_id, 1, 12)
  ) %>%
  relocate(case_submitter_id, .after = sample_submitter_id) %>% 
  distinct(case_submitter_id, .keep_all = TRUE)

# Retain one expression sample per case

sum(duplicated(expr_t$case_submitter_id))
sum(duplicated(expr_t$sample_submitter_id))
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 7. Merge clinical + expression data
#--------------------------------------------------

merged_clinical_expression <- clinical_master %>%
  inner_join(expr_t, by = "case_submitter_id")
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 8. Methylation matrix
#--------------------------------------------------
meth_files <- list.files(
  here("data", "raw", "MethylationData"),
  full.names = TRUE)
```

```{r}
meth_lookup <- sample_sheet %>%
  filter(
    str_detect(data_category, regex("methyl", ignore_case = TRUE)) |
      str_detect(data_type, regex("methyl", ignore_case = TRUE)) |
      str_detect(file_name, regex("methyl", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  transmute(
    file_id,
    file_name,
    file_name_stem = str_extract(file_name, "^[^.]+"),
    case_submitter_id = case_id,
    sample_submitter_id = sample_id) %>%
  distinct()

length(meth_files)
nrow(meth_lookup)

read_meth_file <- function(path, meth_lookup) {
  file_base <- basename(path)
  file_stem_from_path <- str_extract(file_base, "^[^.]+")
  
  matched_row <- meth_lookup %>%
    filter(file_name_stem == file_stem_from_path)
  
  if (nrow(matched_row) == 0) {
    warning("No sample-sheet match found for file stem: ", file_stem_from_path)
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  sample_id <- matched_row$sample_submitter_id[1]
  
  read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    rename(
      probe_id = 1,
      !!sample_id := 2
    ) %>%
    mutate(!!sample_id := as.numeric(.data[[sample_id]]))
}
```

```{r}
meth_list <- lapply(meth_files, read_meth_file, meth_lookup = meth_lookup)
meth_list <- meth_list[!sapply(meth_list, is.null)]

length(meth_list)

if (length(meth_list) == 0) {
  stop("All methylation files returned NULL. Check file_id matching.")
}

meth_match_check <- tibble(
  n_files_found = length(meth_files),
  n_files_read = length(meth_list),
  n_lookup_rows = nrow(meth_lookup)
)

meth_match_check

meth_wide <- reduce(meth_list, full_join, by = "probe_id")
```

```{r}
meth_t <- meth_wide %>%
  column_to_rownames("probe_id") %>%
  t() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("sample_submitter_id") %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  mutate(
    case_submitter_id = str_sub(sample_submitter_id, 1, 12)
  ) %>%
  relocate(case_submitter_id, .after = sample_submitter_id) %>%
  distinct(case_submitter_id, .keep_all = TRUE)
```

```{r}
merged_clinical_methylation <- clinical_master %>%
  inner_join(meth_t, by = "case_submitter_id")
```

```{r}
common_cases <- Reduce(
  intersect,
  list(
    clinical_master$case_submitter_id,
    expr_t$case_submitter_id,
    meth_t$case_submitter_id))

expr_t_model <- expr_t %>%
  rename(expression_sample_id = sample_submitter_id)

meth_t_model <- meth_t %>%
  rename(methylation_sample_id = sample_submitter_id)

merged_clinical_multiomic <- clinical_master %>%
  filter(case_submitter_id %in% common_cases) %>%
  inner_join(expr_t_model, by = "case_submitter_id") %>%
  inner_join(meth_t_model, by = "case_submitter_id")
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 9. ID checks
#--------------------------------------------------

id_checks <- tibble(
  object = c("clinical_master", "expr_t", "meth_t", "merged_clinical_expression", "merged_clinical_methylation", "merged_clinical_multiomic"),
  n_rows = c(
    nrow(clinical_master),
    nrow(expr_t),
    nrow(meth_t),
    nrow(merged_clinical_expression),
    nrow(merged_clinical_methylation),
    nrow(merged_clinical_multiomic)
  ),
  n_unique_cases = c(
    n_distinct(clinical_master$case_submitter_id),
    n_distinct(expr_t$case_submitter_id),
    n_distinct(meth_t$case_submitter_id),
    n_distinct(merged_clinical_expression$case_submitter_id),
    n_distinct(merged_clinical_methylation$case_submitter_id),
    n_distinct(merged_clinical_multiomic$case_submitter_id)))

id_checks
```
```{r}
# Unmatched cases

all_cases <- union(
  union(clinical_master$case_submitter_id, expr_t$case_submitter_id),
  meth_t$case_submitter_id
)

case_match_check <- tibble(
  case_submitter_id = all_cases,
  in_clinical = case_submitter_id %in% clinical_master$case_submitter_id,
  in_expression = case_submitter_id %in% expr_t$case_submitter_id,
  in_methylation = case_submitter_id %in% meth_t$case_submitter_id
) %>%
  mutate(
    complete_multiomic = in_clinical & in_expression & in_methylation
  ) %>%
  filter(!complete_multiomic)

case_match_check

case_match_check %>%
  mutate(
    missing_from = case_when(
      !in_clinical ~ "clinical_master",
      !in_expression ~ "expression",
      !in_methylation ~ "methylation",
      TRUE ~ "none"
    )
  )
```

```{r}
clinical_master %>% count(case_submitter_id) %>% filter(n > 1)
expr_t %>% count(case_submitter_id) %>% filter(n > 1)
meth_t %>% count(case_submitter_id) %>% filter(n > 1)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 10. Save outputs
#--------------------------------------------------

write_rds(sample_manifest, here("data", "interim", "sample_manifest.rds"))
write_rds(clinical_master, here("data", "interim", "clinical_master.rds"))

write_rds(expr_t, here("data", "interim", "expression_clean.rds"))
write_rds(merged_clinical_expression, here("data", "interim", "merged_clinical_expression.rds"))

write_rds(meth_wide, here("data", "interim", "methylation_matrix_wide.rds"))
write_rds(meth_t, here("data", "interim", "methylation_clean.rds"))
write_rds(merged_clinical_methylation, here("data", "interim", "merged_clinical_methylation.rds"))

write_rds(merged_clinical_multiomic, here("data", "interim", "merged_clinical_multiomic.rds"))
```
